Curve.subtext: Our Curve-Fit features an additional 2" in the low hip and 1.5" in the thigh for a perfect, curvy fit with no waist gap.

(Re)Camel Wool.subtext: Recycled camel hair and virgin wool.

(Re)fined.subtext: Gently structured fabric with a soft, wool-like feel.

(Re)ssential.subtext: Soft structure fabric with a smooth texture.

(Re)ssential Light.subtext: Soft stretch fabric that's lightweight and drapey.

AirBUTTER\u2122.subtext: A light-as-air version of our cult-favourite BUTTER.

AirPlush Cotton\u2122.subtext: Easy-care 100% organic cotton ideal for warmer weather.

BUTTER.subtext: Barely-there, buttery soft sweat-wicking fabric that shapes to your body.

Baby Rib Seamless.subtext: The really, really fine rib. Forms to your shape for a perfect fit with minimal seams for comfort.

Bare Cashmere.subtext: Lightweight and all-season, yet warm enough to stave off that chill.

Bare Merino Wool.subtext: Lightweight for all-season wear and layering.

BodyGlide.subtext: Seamless and sweat-wicking anti-odour fabric with a smooth, second-skin feel.

BodyGrip\u2122.subtext: Seamless pique-knit fabric that grips just right for a smooth, flawless fit.

BodyLuxe.subtext: Seamless fabric with an ultra-soft, body-hugging feel.

Brushed Cashmere.subtext: Lofty yet lightweight with a unique brushed and fluffy look

Casual Contour.subtext: The cotton-soft version of our coveted Contour fabric.

City Wool.subtext: Soft structure fabric with a twill texture.

Coldstop\u2122.subtext: Waterproof and windproof fabric with a soft sructure and a crisp feel.

CottonMelt\u2122.subtext: Seamless, body-hugging, soft ribbed fabric perfect for low-impact activities.

Crepette\u2122.subtext: Japanese crepe that bassically never wrinkles.

CruiseLinen\u2122.subtext: Soft, airy fabric that combines naturally textured linen with TENCEL™ Lyocell.

Daisy Seamless.subtext: Body-hugging floral lace. Tubular-knit technology creates the perfect form-fitting silhouette with minimal seams.

Essential Cashmere.subtext: Perfectly balanced and midweight. Cozy with that classic cashmere feel.

Essential Merino Wool.subtext: Crafted for a perfectly balanced feel. Lofty, luxurious — you’ll love.

Feather Cashmere.subtext: Feathery light and loosely knit to achieve an airy, all-season feel.

FigureForm.subtext: Luxuriously smooth fabric with a compressive feel and firm, figure-forming hold.

Flora Seamless.subtext: Body-hugging lace. Tubular-knit technology creates the perfect form-fitting silhouette.

FormaFleece\u2122.subtext: Premium fleece with a smooth feel inside and out.

GloTone\u2122.subtext: Sweat-wicking, sculpting fabric with a subtle sheen and sleek, body-hugging feel.

GlossForm\u2122.subtext: Contouring, body-hugging fabric with a luxe sheen and UPF 50+ protection.

HeatForm\u2122.subtext: Sweat-wicking, winter-weight fabric with a fleece-like interior and a smooth exterior.

Hi-Gloss.subtext: Water-repellent, wind-resistant French taffeta with a glossy finish.

HomeStretch\u2122 Rib.subtext: Body-hugging, stretchy ribbed fabric with a cottony soft feel.

HomeStretch\u2122 Smooth.subtext: Body-hugging, stretch jersey fabric with a cottony soft feel.

LIFE.subtext: Versatile, body-hugging fabric with a cottony soft feel.

LIFE Rib.subtext: Versatile, body-hugging fabric with a cottony soft feel. This version has a ribbed texture.

Liquid Shine.subtext: Water-resistant, windproof stretch fabric with a velvety sheen.

Lite Shine.subtext: Soft, water-repellent fabric with a subtle sheen.

Luxe (Re)Wool.subtext: Soft, warm fabric made with 98% recycled wool.

Luxe Wool Cashmere.subtext: Virgin wool and cashmere with a refined feel.

Mirror Crepe.subtext: Drapey satin back crepe with a fine texture.

MoveTech\u2122.subtext: Lightweight, sweat-wicking fabric with a smooth, cool feel and a natural drape that moves with you.

Orbit Stretch\u2122.subtext: Water-repellent, soft-matte fabric with all-around stretch.

Original Contour.subtext: Luxe, ultra-flattering fabric covered for its smoothing effect and second-skin feel.

PimaForm.subtext: Super soft, barely-there ribbed fabric made with TENCEL™ Modal.

Plush Cashmere.subtext: Heavyweight and plush for that ultra cozy feel.

Pointella Seamless.subtext: Pointelle-laced jersey. Tubular-knit technology creates the perfect form-fitting silhouette.

PowerSculpt\u2122.subtext: Sweat-wicking fabric with a slick, cool touch and sculpting feel.

Rainstop\u2122.subtext: Waterproof, windproof Japanese ripstop with two-layer construction.

Rib Seamless.subtext: The innovative body-hugging rib. Forms to your shape for a perfect fit with minimal seams for comfort.

Scrunchee.subtext: Super flexible and textural. Forms to your shape for a perfect fit with minimal seams for comfort.

Sculpt Knit.subtext: Our signature figure-enhancing yarn. Holds you in all the right places to shape and sculpt your form.

Seamless.subtext: Our smooth-look, smooth-feel fabrics crafted for unbeatable comfort. In ribbed, smooth or Scrunchee.

ShapeEnhance\u2122.subtext: A new shapewear essential. Delivers curve-defining compression with minimal seams for comfort.

ShapeLock.subtext: Soft, sweat-wicking yarn with a second-skin feel and the perfect amount of stretch for shape retention.

Smooth Seamless.subtext: When we say smooth, we mean it. Forms to your shape for a perfect fit with minimal seams for comfort.

Soft Seamless.subtext: Ultra soft and smooth. Tubular-knit technology creates the perfect form-fitting silhouette.

Soft Wool Cashmere.subtext: Virgin wool and cashmere with a luxuriously plush feel.

SoftBound\u2122.subtext: Cozy brushed fabric with next-level softness for comfort on-the-go.

SoftSet\u2122.subtext: Soft, sweat-wicking yarn with a plush feel and the perfect amount of stretch to hug your foot.

SoftWhip\u2122.subtext: Supportive, sweat-wicking fabric with an ultra-soft, buttery texture and body-hugging hold.

SoftWrap.subtext: Supportive, sweat-wicking fabric with an ultra-soft, buttery texture and body-hugging hold.

TnaBUTTER\u2122.subtext: Second skin. Ultra-buttery texture. Barely there feel.

TnaGLOSS\u2122.subtext: Contouring. Luxe, glossy sheen. Smooth texture.

UnReal Leather.subtext: Innovative fabric that looks and feels like the real thing.

cliMATTE\u2122.subtext: Matte Japanese ripstop that’s water repellent and wind resistant.

Height.subtext: Shop styles in Short, Regular and Tall to find your best fit

Light Support.subtext: A gentle, barely there fit with light support.

Medium Support.subtext: A versatile, balanced fit with medium support.

Ready to Ship.subtext: Hides special orders and sold out items.

Comfort Stretch.subtext: Soft feel denim with a hint of stretch for added comfort.

Non Stretch.subtext: 100% cotton, molds to your body over time.

Super Stretch.subtext: Sculpting stretch denim with shape-retention and give.

Responsible Forestry.subtext: Contains wood-based fabrics from sustainably managed forests.

seoProductDesc.value: Japanese crepe relaxed wider-leg pull-on pants

designersNotes.value: We took the elastic-waist pant and elevated it. These are high-rise pants beloved for their unmatched comfort and refined look. They’re made with Crepette™ — our one-of-a-kind Japanese crepe fabric beloved for its subtle texture, breezy drape and the fact that it basically never wrinkles.

hits.designersNotes: We took the elastic-waist pant and elevated it. seoProductDesc.value: 100% cotton poplin top with puff sleeves

designersNotes.value: This is a shortsleeve top with puff sleeves and a relaxed fit. It's made with 100% cotton poplin with a crisp, airy feel that’s smooth to the touch.

hits.designersNotes: This is a shortsleeve top with puff sleeves and a relaxed fit. It's made with 100% cotton poplin with a crisp, airy feel that’s smooth to the touch.

designersNotes.value: This is a longsleeve polo with a relaxed fit. It's made with InterLock Cotton — 100% cotton, ideal for everyday wear. Double-knit, interlock construction gives this fabric a refined, soft yet structured feel. This version features an exclusive, custom-designed stripe pattern.

hits.name: InterLock Cotton Eton Longsleeve
hits.designersNotes: This is a longsleeve polo with a relaxed fit. It's made with InterLock Cotton — 100% cotton, ideal for everyday wear. Double-knit, interlock construction gives this fabric a refined, soft yet structured feel. This version features an exclusive, custom-designed stripe pattern.

designersNotes.value: This is a scoopneck tank with a slim fit. It’s made from soft cotton rib with a comfortable stretch that’s perfect for everyday wear.

hits.designersNotes: This is a scoopneck tank with a slim fit. It’s made from soft cotton rib with a comfortable stretch that’s perfect for everyday wear.

designersNotes.value: The original goes-with-everything trouser, these are tailored-yet-relaxed high-rise pants with front knife pleats, an easy drape and a long, wide leg. They're made with (Re)ssential — softly structured stretch fabric that holds its form while you move easy. This fabric is sourced from a premier Portuguese mill and made with 58% recycled polyester and 28% LENZING™ ECOVERO™ Viscose.

hits.designersNotes: The original goes-with-everything trouser, these are tailored-yet-relaxed high-rise pants with front knife pleats, an easy drape and a long, wide leg. They're made with (Re)ssential — softly structured stretch fabric that holds its form while you move easy. hits.c_displayName: Denim Forum The '90s Iggy Lo-Rise Baggy Jean
hits.seoProductDesc: Non-stretch low-rise baggy jeans made with regenerative cotton
hits.designersNotes: Inspired by the bold, authentic spirit of '90s punk, The Iggy is Denim Forum's signature baggy jean. They have a low rise and loose, slouchy leg — for those who dare to go big. They’re cut from heavyweight, non-stretch denim that molds to your body over time. This fabric is sourced from a premier Italian mill and made with 100% regenagri-certified regenerative cotton. This version comes in a light-medium indigo wash with a clean hem.

seoProductDesc.value: Non-stretch low-rise baggy jeans made with regenerative cotton

hits.name: InterLock Cotton Script Top
hits.designersNotes: This is a shortsleeve one-shoulder tee with ruched detailing and a classic fit. It’s made with InterLock Cotton — 100% cotton, ideal for everyday wear. Double-knit, interlock construction gives this fabric a refined, soft yet structured feel.

designersNotes.value: This is a shortsleeve one-shoulder tee with ruched detailing and a classic fit. It’s made with InterLock Cotton — 100% cotton, ideal for everyday wear. Double-knit, interlock construction gives this fabric a refined, soft yet structured feel.

hits.name: The '80s Comfy Denim Shirt
hits.c_displayName: Denim Forum The '80s Comfy Denim Shirt

c_displayName.value: Denim Forum The '80s Comfy Denim Shirt

designersNotes.value: Inspired by the infamous decade, The '80s Comfy is Denim Forum's signature oversized denim shirt. It has classic details like button-closure cuffs, a patch pocket and a rounded hem. It's cut from lightweight and drapey non-stretch denim with a soft feel. This version comes in a light indigo wash with a clean hem.

hits.designersNotes: Inspired by the infamous decade, The '80s Comfy is Denim Forum's signature oversized denim shirt. This version comes in a light indigo wash with a clean hem.

hits.seoProductDesc: Smocked chiffon longsleeve mini dress with paisley pattern
hits.designersNotes: This is a longsleeve mini dress with a smocked neckline, waistband and cuffs. It's crafted from semi-sheer chiffon with a crinkled texture and soft drape. This fabric is made with 55% LENZING™ ECOVERO™ Viscose. This version features an exclusive, custom-designed paisley pattern.

hits.name: The Farrah Hi-Rise Wide Jean

seoProductDesc.value: Non-stretch high-rise wide-leg jeans made with regenerative cotton

c_displayName.value: Denim Forum The Farrah Hi-Rise Wide Jean

designersNotes.value: Inspired by bold, adventurous '70s icons, The Farrah is Denim Forum’s signature wide-leg jean. With a high rise and slim hip, The Farrah hugs the figure and gradually widens from the leg, ending in a clean hem. They're cut from heavyweight, non-stretch denim that molds to your body over time. This fabric is sourced from a premier Italian mill and made with 100% regenagri-certified regenerative cotton. These ones come in white.

hits.designersNotes: This is a crewneck cardigan with scalloped edges and a slim fit. It's knit with Wonder Yarn — the lightweight yarn that lives up to its name. This fabric offers the peachy softness of wool, without the wool. It’s made with LENZING™ ECOVERO™ Viscose. This version is constructed using a Full Milano stitch with a double-layer structure for a flat, dense feel.

This version is constructed using a Full Milano stitch with a double-layer structure for a flat, dense feel.

designersNotes.value: This is a crewneck tee with a tight fit. It's made with Aritzia's HomeStretch™ Rib — body-hugging, stretchy ribbed fabric with a cottony soft feel. For your everyday. It features an exclusive, custom-designed stripe pattern.

hits.designersNotes: This is a crewneck tee with a tight fit. It's made with Aritzia's HomeStretch™ Rib — body-hugging, stretchy ribbed fabric with a cottony soft feel. For your everyday. It features an exclusive, custom-designed stripe pattern.
hits.name: HomeStretch™ Rib Tune T-Shirt

designersNotes.value: A fan favourite with a reputation as the hoodie of all hoodies, this is a pullover sweatshirt with a kanga pocket, dropped shoulders and ribbed trim. It’s made with Aritzia's Cozy Sweatfleece — premium midweight fleece famous for its soft-brushed back, sueded face and cloud-nine plush feel. The best kind of cozy. This garment has been perfected season after season for that just-right fit and feel.

It’s made with Aritzia's Cozy Sweatfleece — premium midweight fleece famous for its soft-brushed back, sueded face and cloud-nine plush feel. The best kind of cozy. ShapeLock.subtext: Soft, sweat-wicking yarn with a second-skin feel and the perfect amount of stretch for shape retention.

Smooth Seamless.subtext: When we say smooth, we mean it. Forms to your shape for a perfect fit with minimal seams for comfort.

Soft Seamless.subtext: Ultra soft and smooth. Tubular-knit technology creates the perfect form-fitting silhouette.

Soft Wool Cashmere.subtext: Virgin wool and cashmere with a luxuriously plush feel.

SoftBound\u2122.subtext: Cozy brushed fabric with next-level softness for comfort on-the-go.

SoftSet\u2122.subtext: Soft, sweat-wicking yarn with a plush feel and the perfect amount of stretch to hug your foot.

SoftWhip\u2122.subtext: Supportive, sweat-wicking fabric with an ultra-soft, buttery texture and body-hugging hold.

SoftWrap.subtext: Supportive, sweat-wicking fabric with an ultra-soft, buttery texture and body-hugging hold.

TnaBUTTER\u2122.subtext: Second skin. Ultra-buttery texture. Barely there feel.

TnaGLOSS\u2122.subtext: Contouring. Luxe, glossy sheen. Smooth texture.

UnReal Leather.subtext: Innovative fabric that looks and feels like the real thing.

cliMATTE\u2122.subtext: Matte Japanese ripstop that’s water repellent and wind resistant.

Height.subtext: Shop styles in Short, Regular and Tall to find your best fit

Light Support.subtext: A gentle, barely there fit with light support.

Medium Support.subtext: A versatile, balanced fit with medium support.

Ready to Ship.subtext: Hides special orders and sold out items.

Comfort Stretch.subtext: Soft feel denim with a hint of stretch for added comfort.

Non Stretch.subtext: 100% cotton, molds to your body over time.

Super Stretch.subtext: Sculpting stretch denim with shape-retention and give.

Responsible Forestry.subtext: Contains wood-based fabrics from sustainably managed forests.
